goals.title: Enhance Recruitment Processes
goals.description:
Goal: Streamline and improve the recruitment process to reduce time-to-hire and improve candidate quality.
KPI: Reduce average time-to-hire by 20% and increase candidate satisfaction scores by 15%.

goals.title: Improve Employee Onboarding
goals.description:
Goal: Develop a comprehensive onboarding program to enhance new employee integration and retention.
KPI: Achieve a 90% satisfaction rate in onboarding feedback surveys and reduce new hire turnover by 10%.
